text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
show?/Scope#resolve now resolve visibility through
Pundit.policy_scope(user, commentable.class) rather than a
bare Pundit.policy(user, commentable)&.show? boolean —
keeps comment visibility consistent with the viewer's own
scoped list for that commentable type.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Default state (all enums 'inherit') is readable with
zero rows in the table — Commentable#comment_permission/
#comment_visibility fall back to 'inherit' via &.permission
when no CommentConfig row exists yet.
